name: king-arch
description: King Arch: arquitectura de software y sistemas distribuidos del ecosistema King Framework. Patrones de arquitectura (/clean-arch-setup, /hexagonal-setup, /ddd-tactical, /cqrs-setup, /event-sourcing); sistemas distribuidos (/saga-design, /microservice-extract, /event-broker-setup); resiliencia (/resilience-weave, /idempotency); contratos de API (/api-contract-first, /contract-test-pact). Lee agentes (@architect/@developer/@qa/@api/@performance/@tenancy-enforcer), knowledge compartido (architecture-patterns, resilience-patterns) y session-management de king-core cross-plugin. Alimenta las capas Architecture y Contracts de CASTLE.
